VALIDATION_ERROR: Validation failed. Please check your input and try again
WENTS_WRONG: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
USER_SIGNUP_SUCCESS: A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox.
EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This email address is already registered. Please use a different email.
PASSWORD_MISMATCH: Password and Confirm Password must be the same. Please double-check and try again.
USER_NOT_ACTIVE: This user account is currently inactive. Please contact the administrator for assistance.
TOKEN_GENERATION_ERROR: Error generating token. Please try again later.
VERIFY_EMAIL_TITLE: Verify Your Email - ShieldIQ Account Activation 🚀
FORGET_PASSWORD_TITLE: Reset Your Password - ShieldIQ Password Reset 🔑
WELCOME_USER_TITLE: Welcome to ShieldIQ! Your Journey Starts Here 🎉
INVALID_TOKEN: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
EMAIL_ALREADY_VERIFIED: Your email is already verified. You can log in now.
EMAIL_VERIFY_SUCCESS: Your email has been successfully verified.
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email is not verified. Please verify your email to proceed.
AUTHORIZATION_TOKEN_REQUIRED: Authorization token is missing. Please provide a valid token to proceed.
INVALID_AUTHORIZATION_TOKEN: Invalid authorization token. Please provide a valid token or reauthenticate.
FORGET_PASSWORD_LINK_SENT_SUCCESSFULLY: A password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox.
INVALID_FORGOT_PASSWORD_TOKEN: The forgot password link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
OLD_PASSWORD_NOT_ALLOWED: You cannot use the same password as your old password. Please choose a different password.
PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
INVALID_ACCESS_TOKEN: Invalid access token. Please provide a valid token or reauthenticate.
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Access token is expired. Please provide a valid token or reauthenticate.
REFRESH_TOKEN_SUCCESS: Access token and refresh token have been refreshed successfully.
INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Invalid refresh token. Please login again.
UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS: You do not have permission to access this resource.
CAMPAIGN_START_DATE_NOT_BE_IN_PAST: Campaign start date cannot be in past.
CAMPAIGN_END_DATE_NOT_BE_IN_PAST: Campaign end date cannot be in past.
CAMPAIGN_END_DATE_CANT_BE_BEFORE_START_D: Campaign end date cannot be before start date.
